description_long: This object is a short sword with a broad, leaf-shaped blade that tapers to a rounded point. The blade is metallic and has a smooth, slightly reflective surface, with no visible serrations or engravings. The hilt features a simple, straight crossguard that is slightly wider than the blade, providing basic hand protection. The handle is cylindrical and wrapped in a brown material, likely leather or a similar substance, with visible ridges for improved grip. The pommel is rounded and appears to be made of the same material as the guard, providing balance to the weapon. There are no visible decorative elements or ornamentation on the blade, guard, or handle.
description: A short, broad-bladed sword with a smooth metallic finish, a simple crossguard, and a brown ridged handle. The design is utilitarian with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the broad, leaf-shaped blade, the straight crossguard, and the cylindrical brown handle.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel visible as narrow elements.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the blade, crossguard, and handle, with similar proportions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, with the crossguard and pommel in profile.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, brown, ridged, likely leather-wrapped, rounded pommel
